---
title: "Parse Errors"
format: html
---

This is not executable R code:

``` r
library(dplyr

a <- 1 + 1
```

But this is:

```{r}
# C1: this should give a parse error
library(dplyr

a <- 1 + 1
x <- read.csv("/User/lisa/file.csv")
```

This is not detected yet as it's python:

```{python}
# also a parse error
import numpy s np
```
